children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: The amount of the taxable income of any new loss corporation for any post-change year which may be offset by pre-change losses shall not exceed the section 382 limitation for such year.

children.label: A
children.text: the value of the old loss corporation, multiplied by

children.label: B
children.text: the long-term tax-exempt rate.

children.heading: Carryforward of unused limitation
children.label: 2 Carryforward of unused limitation
children.text: If the section 382 limitation for any post-change year exceeds the taxable income of the new loss corporation for such year which was offset by pre-change losses, the section 382 limitation for the next post-change year shall be increased by the amount of such excess.

children.heading: Special rule for post-change year which includes change date
children.label: 3 Special rule for post-change year which includes change date

children.heading: Limitation does not apply to taxable income before change
children.label: A Limitation does not apply to taxable income before change
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply to the portion of the taxable income for such year which is allocable to the period in such year on or before the change date. Except as provided in subsection (h)(5) and in regulations, taxable income shall be allocated ratably to each day in the year.

children.heading: Limitation for period after change
children.label: B Limitation for period after change
i
children.text: the number of days in such year after the change date, bears to

children.label: ii
children.text: the total number of days in such year.

children.heading: Carryforwards disallowed if continuity of business requirements not met
children.label: c Carryforwards disallowed if continuity of business requirements not met

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), if the new loss corporation does not continue the business enterprise of the old loss corporation at all times during the 2-year period beginning on the change date, the section 382 limitation for any post-change year shall be zero.

children.label: i
children.text: subsection (h)(1)(A) for recognized built-in gains for such year, and

children.label: ii
children.text: subsection (h)(1)(C) for gain recognized by reason of an election under section 338, plus

children.label: B
children.text: any increase in such limitation under subsection (b)(2) for amounts described in subparagraph (A) which are carried forward to such year.

children.heading: Pre-change loss and post-change year
children.label: d Pre-change loss and post-change year
A
children.text: any net operating loss carryforward of the old loss corporation to the taxable year ending with the ownership change or in which the change date occurs, and

children.label: B
children.text: the net operating loss of the old loss corporation for the taxable year in which the ownership change occurs to the extent such loss is allocable to the period in such year on or before the change date.

children.heading: Post-change year
children.label: 2 Post-change year
children.text: The term “post-change year” means any taxable year ending after the change date.

children.heading: Application to carryforward of disallowed interest
children.label: 3 Application to carryforward of disallowed interest
children.text: The term “pre-change loss” shall include any carryover of disallowed interest described in section 163(j)(2) under rules similar to the rules of paragraph (1).

children.heading: Value of old loss corporation
children.label: e Value of old loss corporation

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subsection, the value of the old loss corporation is the value of the stock of such corporation (including any stock described in section 1504(a)(4)) immediately before the ownership change.

children.heading: Special rule in the case of redemption or other corporate contraction
children.label: 2 Special rule in the case of redemption or other corporate contraction
children.text: If a redemption or other corporate contraction occurs in connection with an ownership change, the value under paragraph (1) shall be determined after taking such redemption or other corporate contraction into account.

children.heading: Treatment of foreign corporations
children.label: 3 Treatment of foreign corporations
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in regulations, in determining the value of any old loss corporation which is a foreign corporation, there shall be taken into account only items treated as connected with the conduct of a trade or business in the United States.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The long-term tax-exempt rate shall be the highest of the adjusted Federal long-term rates in effect for any month in the 3-calendar-month period ending with the calendar month in which the change date occurs.

children.label: A
children.text: paragraphs (2) and (3) thereof shall not apply, and

children.label: B
children.text: such rate shall be properly adjusted for differences between rates on long-term taxable and tax-exempt obligations.

children.label: A
children.text: the percentage of the stock of the loss corporation owned by 1 or more 5-percent shareholders has increased by more than 50 percentage points, over

children.label: B
children.text: the lowest percentage of stock of the loss corporation (or any predecessor corporation) owned by such shareholders at any time during the testing period.

children.label: A
children.text: there is any change in the respective ownership of stock of a corporation, and

children.label: B
children.text: such change affects the percentage of stock of such corporation owned by any person who is a 5-percent shareholder before or after such change.

children.label: i
children.text: any reorganization described in subparagraph (D) or (G) of section 368(a)(1) unless the requirements of section 354(b)(1) are met, and

children.label: ii
children.text: any reorganization described in subparagraph (F) of section 368(a)(1).

children.heading: Taxable reorganization-type transactions, etc.
children.label: B Taxable reorganization-type transactions, etc.
children.text: To the extent provided in regulations, the term “equity structure shift” includes taxable reorganization-type transactions, public offerings, and similar transactions.

children.heading: Special rules for application of subsection
children.label: 4 Special rules for application of subsection

children.heading: Treatment of less than 5-percent shareholders
children.label: A Treatment of less than 5-percent shareholders
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraphs (B)(i) and (C), in determining whether an ownership change has occurred, all stock owned by shareholders of a corporation who are not 5-percent shareholders of such corporation shall be treated as stock owned by 1 5-percent shareholder of such corporation.

children.heading: Coordination with equity structure shifts
children.label: B Coordination with equity structure shifts

children.heading: Less than 5-percent shareholders
children.label: i Less than 5-percent shareholders
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall be applied separately with respect to each group of shareholders (immediately before such equity structure shift) of each corporation which was a party to the reorganization involved in such equity structure shift.

children.heading: Acquisitions of stock
children.label: ii Acquisitions of stock
children.text: Unless a different proportion is established, acquisitions of stock after such equity structure shift shall be treated as being made proportionately from all shareholders immediately before such acquisition.

children.heading: Coordination with other owner shifts
children.label: C Coordination with other owner shifts
children.text: Except as provided in regulations, rules similar to the rules of subparagraph (B) shall apply in determining whether there has been an owner shift involving a 5-percent shareholder and whether such shift (or subsequent transaction) results in an ownership change.

children.label: i
children.text: shall be treated as having acquired such stock on the 1st day of his 1st succeeding taxable year, and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall not be treated as having owned such stock during any prior period.

children.heading: Special rules for built-in gains and losses and section 338 gains
children.label: h Special rules for built-in gains and losses and section 338 gains

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: If the old loss corporation has a net unrealized built-in gain, the section 382 limitation for any recognition period taxable year shall be increased by the recognized built-in gains for such taxable year.

children.label: I
children.text: the net unrealized built-in gain, reduced by

children.label: II
children.text: recognized built-in gains for prior years ending in the recognition period.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: If the old loss corporation has a net unrealized built-in loss, the recognized built-in loss for any recognition period taxable year shall be subject to limitation under this section in the same manner as if such loss were a pre-change loss.

children.label: I
children.text: the net unrealized built-in loss, reduced by

children.label: II
children.text: recognized built-in losses for prior taxable years ending in the recognition period.

children.heading: Special rules for certain section 338 gains
children.label: C Special rules for certain section 338 gains
i
children.text: the recognized built-in gains by reason of such election, or

children.label: ii
children.text: the net unrealized built-in gain (determined without regard to paragraph (3)(B)).

children.label: i
children.text: such asset was held by the old loss corporation immediately before the change date, and

children.label: I
children.text: the fair market value of such asset on the change date, over

children.label: II
children.text: the adjusted basis of such asset on such date.

children.label: i
children.text: such asset was not held by the old loss corporation immediately before the change date, or

children.label: I
children.text: the adjusted basis of such asset on the change date, over

children.label: II
children.text: the fair market value of such asset on such date.

children.heading: Net unrealized built-in gain and loss defined
children.label: 3 Net unrealized built-in gain and loss defined

children.heading: Net unrealized built-in gain and loss
children.label: A Net unrealized built-in gain and loss
I
children.text: the fair market value of the assets of such corporation immediately before an ownership change is more or less, respectively, than

children.label: II
children.text: the aggregate adjusted basis of such assets at such time.

children.heading: Special rule for redemptions or other corporate contractions
children.label: ii Special rule for redemptions or other corporate contractions
children.text: If a redemption or other corporate contraction occurs in connection with an ownership change, to the extent provided in regulations, determinations under clause (i) shall be made after taking such redemption or other corporate contraction into account.

children.label: I
children.text: 15 percent of the amount determined for purposes of subparagraph (A)(i)(I), or

children.heading: Cash and cash items not taken into account
children.label: ii Cash and cash items not taken into account
I
children.text: any cash or cash item, or

children.label: II
children.text: any marketable security which has a value which does not substantially differ from adjusted basis.

children.heading: Disallowed loss allowed as a carryforward
children.label: 4 Disallowed loss allowed as a carryforward
A
children.text: shall be carried forward to subsequent taxable years under rules similar to the rules for the carrying forward of net operating losses (or to the extent the amount so disallowed is attributable to capital losses, under rules similar to the rules for the carrying forward of net capital losses), but

children.label: B
children.text: shall be subject to limitation under this section in the same manner as a pre-change loss.

children.heading: Special rules for post-change year which includes change date
children.label: 5 Special rules for post-change year which includes change date
A
children.text: in applying subparagraph (A) thereof, taxable income shall be computed without regard to recognized built-in gains to the extent such gains increased the section 382 limitation for the year (or recognized built-in losses to the extent such losses are treated as pre-change losses), and gain described in paragraph (1)(C), for the year, and

children.label: B
children.text: in applying subparagraph (B) thereof, the section 382 limitation shall be computed without regard to recognized built-in gains, and gain described in paragraph (1)(C), for the year.

children.heading: Income items
children.label: A Income items
children.text: Any item of income which is properly taken into account during the recognition period but which is attributable to periods before the change date shall be treated as a recognized built-in gain for the taxable year in which it is properly taken into account.

children.heading: Deduction items
children.label: B Deduction items
children.text: Any amount which is allowable as a deduction during the recognition period (determined without regard to any carryover) but which is attributable to periods before the change date shall be treated as a recognized built-in loss for the taxable year for which it is allowable as a deduction.

children.heading: Adjustments
children.label: C Adjustments
children.text: The amount of the net unrealized built-in gain or loss shall be properly adjusted for amounts which would be treated as recognized built-in gains or losses under this paragraph if such amounts were properly taken into account (or allowable as a deduction) during the recognition period.

children.heading: Recognition period
children.label: A Recognition period
children.text: The term “recognition period” means, with respect to any ownership change, the 5-year period beginning on the change date.

children.heading: Recognition period taxable year
children.label: B Recognition period taxable year
children.text: The term “recognition period taxable year” means any taxable year any portion of which is in the recognition period.

children.heading: Determination of fair market value in certain cases
children.label: 8 Determination of fair market value in certain cases
children.text: If 80 percent or more in value of the stock of a corporation is acquired in 1 transaction (or in a series of related transactions during any 12-month period), for purposes of determining the net unrealized built-in loss, the fair market value of the assets of such corporation shall not exceed the grossed up amount paid for such stock properly adjusted for indebtedness of the corporation and other relevant items.

children.heading: Tax-free exchanges or transfers
children.label: 9 Tax-free exchanges or transfers
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subsection where property held on the change date was acquired (or is subsequently transferred) in a transaction where gain or loss is not recognized (in whole or in part).

children.heading: 3-year period
children.label: 1 3-year period
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, the testing period is the 3-year period ending on the day of any owner shift involving a 5-percent shareholder or equity structure shift.

children.heading: Shorter period where there has been recent ownership change
children.label: 2 Shorter period where there has been recent ownership change
children.text: If there has been an ownership change under this section, the testing period for determining whether a 2nd ownership change has occurred shall not begin before the 1st day following the change date for such earlier ownership change.

children.heading: Shorter period where all losses arise after 3-year period begins
children.label: 3 Shorter period where all losses arise after 3-year period begins
children.text: The testing period shall not begin before the earlier of the 1st day of the 1st taxable year from which there is a carryforward of a loss or of an excess credit to the 1st post-change year or the taxable year in which the transaction being tested occurs. Except as provided in regulations, this paragraph shall not apply to any loss corporation which has a net unrealized built-in loss (determined after application of subsection (h)(3)(B)).
in the case where the last component of an ownership change is an owner shift involving a 5-percent shareholder, the date on which such shift occurs, and
in the case where the last component of an ownership change is an equity structure shift, the date of the reorganization.

children.heading: Loss corporation
children.label: 1 Loss corporation
children.text: The term “loss corporation” means a corporation entitled to use a net operating loss carryover or having a net operating loss for the taxable year in which the ownership change occurs. Such term shall include any corporation entitled to use a carryforward of disallowed interest described in section 381(c)(20). Except to the extent provided in regulations, such term includes any corporation with a net unrealized built-in loss.

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to which there is an ownership change, and

children.label: B
children.text: which (before the ownership change) was a loss corporation.

children.heading: New loss corporation
children.label: 3 New loss corporation
children.text: The term “new loss corporation” means a corporation which (after an ownership change) is a loss corporation. Nothing in this section shall be treated as implying that the same corporation may not be both the old loss corporation and the new loss corporation.

children.heading: Taxable income
children.label: 4 Taxable income
children.text: Taxable income shall be computed with the modifications set forth in section 172(d).

children.heading: Value
children.label: 5 Value
children.text: The term “value” means fair market value.

children.heading: Preferred stock
children.label: A Preferred stock
children.text: Except as provided in regulations and subsection (e), the term “stock” means stock other than stock described in section 1504(a)(4).

children.heading: Treatment of certain rights, etc.
children.label: B Treatment of certain rights, etc.
i
children.text: to treat warrants, options, contracts to acquire stock, convertible debt interests, and other similar interests as stock, and

children.label: ii
children.text: to treat stock as not stock.

children.heading: Determinations on basis of value
children.label: C Determinations on basis of value
children.text: Determinations of the percentage of stock of any corporation held by any person shall be made on the basis of value.

children.heading: 5-percent shareholder
children.label: 7 5-percent shareholder
children.text: The term “5-percent shareholder” means any person holding 5 percent or more of the stock of the corporation at any time during the testing period.

children.heading: Certain capital contributions not taken into account
children.label: 1 Certain capital contributions not taken into account

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Any capital contribution received by an old loss corporation as part of a plan a principal purpose of which is to avoid or increase any limitation under this section shall not be taken into account for purposes of this section.

children.heading: Certain contributions treated as part of plan
children.label: B Certain contributions treated as part of plan
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), any capital contribution made during the 2-year period ending on the change date shall, except as provided in regulations, be treated as part of a plan described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Ordering rules for application of section
children.label: 2 Ordering rules for application of section

children.heading: Coordination with section 172(b) carryover rules
children.label: A Coordination with section 172(b) carryover rules
i
children.text: the section 382 limitation for such taxable year, reduced by

children.label: ii
children.text: the unused pre-change losses for taxable years preceding the loss year.

children.heading: Ordering rule for losses carried from same taxable year
children.label: B Ordering rule for losses carried from same taxable year
i
children.text: a pre-change loss of a loss corporation for any taxable year is subject to a section 382 limitation, and

children.label: ii
children.text: a net operating loss of such corporation from such taxable year is not subject to such limitation,

children.heading: Operating rules relating to ownership of stock
children.label: 3 Operating rules relating to ownership of stock
i
children.text: paragraphs (1) and (5)(B) of section 318(a) shall not apply and an individual and all members of his family described in paragraph (1) of section 318(a) shall be treated as 1 individual for purposes of applying this section,

children.label: I
children.text: without regard to the 50-percent limitation contained in subparagraph (C) thereof, and

children.label: II
children.text: except as provided in regulations, by treating stock attributed thereunder as no longer being held by the entity from which attributed,

children.label: iii
children.text: paragraph (3) of section 318(a) shall be applied only to the extent provided in regulations,

children.label: iv
children.text: except to the extent provided in regulations, an option to acquire stock shall be treated as exercised if such exercise results in an ownership change, and

children.label: I
children.text: in the case of attribution from a corporation, stock which is not treated as stock for purposes of this section, or

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of attribution from another entity, an interest in such entity similar to stock described in subclause (I).

children.heading: Stock acquired by reason of death, gift, divorce, separation, etc.
children.label: B Stock acquired by reason of death, gift, divorce, separation, etc.
I
children.text: under section 1014 (relating to property acquired from a decedent),

children.label: II
children.text: section 1015 (relating to property acquired by a gift or transfer in trust), or

children.label: III
children.text: section 1041(b)(2) (relating to transfers of property between spouses or incident to divorce),

children.label: ii
children.text: stock is received by any person in satisfaction of a right to receive a pecuniary bequest, or

children.label: iii
children.text: stock is acquired by a person pursuant to any divorce or separation instrument (within the meaning of section 121(d)(3)(C)),

children.heading: Certain changes in percentage ownership which are attributable to fluctuations in value not taken into account
children.label: C Certain changes in percentage ownership which are attributable to fluctuations in value not taken into account
children.text: Except as provided in regulations, any change in proportionate ownership which is attributable solely to fluctuations in the relative fair market values of different classes of stock shall not be taken into account.

children.heading: Reduction in value where substantial nonbusiness assets
children.label: 4 Reduction in value where substantial nonbusiness assets
i
children.text: the fair market value of the nonbusiness assets of the old loss corporation, over

children.label: ii
children.text: the nonbusiness asset share of indebtedness for which such corporation is liable.

children.heading: Corporation having substantial nonbusiness assets
children.label: B Corporation having substantial nonbusiness assets

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: The old loss corporation shall be treated as having substantial nonbusiness assets if at least ⅓ of the value of the total assets of such corporation consists of nonbusiness assets.

children.heading: Exception for certain investment entities
children.label: ii Exception for certain investment entities
children.text: A regulated investment company to which part I of subchapter M applies, a real estate investment trust to which part II of subchapter M applies, or a REMIC to which part IV of subchapter M applies, shall not be treated as a new loss corporation having substantial nonbusiness assets.

children.heading: Nonbusiness assets
children.label: C Nonbusiness assets
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “nonbusiness assets” means assets held for investment.

children.label: i
children.text: the fair market value of the nonbusiness assets of the corporation, bears to

children.label: ii
children.text: the fair market value of all assets of such corporation.

children.heading: Treatment of subsidiaries
children.label: E Treatment of subsidiaries
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, stock and securities in any subsidiary corporation shall be disregarded and the parent corporation shall be deemed to own its ratable share of the subsidiary’s assets. For purposes of the preceding sentence, a corporation shall be treated as a subsidiary if the parent owns 50 percent or more of the combined voting power of all classes of stock entitled to vote, and 50 percent or more of the total value of shares of all classes of stock.

children.label: i
children.text: the old loss corporation is (immediately before such ownership change) under the jurisdiction of the court in a title 11 or similar case, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the shareholders and creditors of the old loss corporation (determined immediately before such ownership change) own (after such ownership change and as a result of being shareholders or creditors immediately before such change) stock of the new loss corporation (or stock of a controlling corporation if also in bankruptcy) which meets the requirements of section 1504(a)(2) (determined by substituting “50 percent” for “80 percent” each place it appears).

children.heading: Reduction for interest payments to creditors becoming shareholders
children.label: B Reduction for interest payments to creditors becoming shareholders
i
children.text: any taxable year ending during the 3-year period preceding the taxable year in which the ownership change occurs, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the period of the taxable year in which the ownership change occurs on or before the change date.

children.heading: Coordination with section 108
children.label: C Coordination with section 108
children.text: In applying section 108(e)(8) to any case to which subparagraph (A) applies, there shall not be taken into account any indebtedness for interest described in subparagraph (B).

children.heading: Section 382 limitation zero if another change within 2 years
children.label: D Section 382 limitation zero if another change within 2 years
children.text: If, during the 2-year period immediately following an ownership change to which this paragraph applies, an ownership change of the new loss corporation occurs, this paragraph shall not apply and the section 382 limitation with respect to the 2nd ownership change for any post-change year ending after the change date of the 2nd ownership change shall be zero.

children.heading: Only certain stock taken into account
children.label: E Only certain stock taken into account
i
children.text: was held by the creditor at least 18 months before the date of the filing of the title 11 or similar case, or

children.label: ii
children.text: arose in the ordinary course of the trade or business of the old loss corporation and is held by the person who at all times held the beneficial interest in such indebtedness.

children.heading: Title 11 or similar case
children.label: F Title 11 or similar case
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “title 11 or similar case” has the meaning given such term by section 368(a)(3)(A).

children.heading: Election not to have paragraph apply
children.label: G Election not to have paragraph apply
children.text: A new loss corporation may elect, subject to such terms and conditions as the Secretary may prescribe, not to have the provisions of this paragraph apply.

children.heading: Special rule for insolvency transactions
children.label: 6 Special rule for insolvency transactions
children.text: If paragraph (5) does not apply to any reorganization described in subparagraph (G) of section 368(a)(1) or any exchange of debt for stock in a title 11 or similar case (as defined in section 368(a)(3)(A)), the value under subsection (e) shall reflect the increase (if any) in value of the old loss corporation resulting from any surrender or cancellation of creditors’ claims in the transaction.

children.heading: Coordination with alternative minimum tax
children.label: 7 Coordination with alternative minimum tax
children.text: The Secretary shall by regulation provide for the application of this section to the alternative tax net operating loss deduction under section 56(d).

children.heading: Predecessor and successor entities
children.label: 8 Predecessor and successor entities
children.text: Except as provided in regulations, any entity and any predecessor or successor entities of such entity shall be treated as 1 entity.

providing for the application of this section and section 383 where an ownership change with respect to the old loss corporation is followed by an ownership change with respect to the new loss corporation, and
providing for the application of this section and section 383 in the case of a short taxable year,

providing for such adjustments to the application of this section and section 383 as is necessary to prevent the avoidance of the purposes of this section and section 383, including the avoidance of such purposes through the use of related persons, pass-thru entities, or other intermediaries,
providing for the application of subsection (g)(4) where there is only 1 corporation involved, and

providing, in the case of any group of corporations described in section 1563(a) (determined by substituting “50 percent” for “80 percent” each place it appears and determined without regard to paragraph (4) thereof), appropriate adjustments to value, built-in gain or loss, and other items so that items are not omitted or taken into account more than once.

children.heading: Special rule for certain ownership changes
children.label: n Special rule for certain ownership changes
A
children.text: is required under a loan agreement or a commitment for a line of credit entered into with the Department of the Treasury under the Emergency Economic Stabilization Act of 2008, and

children.label: B
children.text: is intended to result in a rationalization of the costs, capitalization, and capacity with respect to the manufacturing workforce of, and suppliers to, the taxpayer and its subsidiaries.

children.heading: Subsequent acquisitions
children.label: 2 Subsequent acquisitions
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply in the case of any subsequent ownership change unless such ownership change is described in such paragraph.

children.heading: Limitation based on control in corporation
children.label: 3 Limitation based on control in corporation

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply in the case of any ownership change if, immediately after such ownership change, any person (other than a voluntary employees’ beneficiary association under section 501(c)(9)) owns stock of the new loss corporation possessing 50 percent or more of the total combined voting power of all classes of stock entitled to vote, or of the total value of the stock of such corporation.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Related persons shall be treated as a single person for purposes of this paragraph.

children.label: I
children.text: such person bears a relationship to such other person described in section 267(b) or 707(b), or

children.label: II
children.text: such persons are members of a group of persons acting in concert.
